name: LINE Reviews - Zero Push Async Reputation Crawler

nodes.name: Verify LINE Signature and Parse Intent
Check if Crawl Report is Ready

parameters.content:
## ZERO PUSH DELIVERY

1. Create a durable pending job.
2. Reply immediately with an accepted message and a status Quick Reply.
3. Run the crawler only after the Reply API node.
4. Run PTT, Google Maps and Threads with bounded async concurrency; at most two isolated Chromium instances are active.
5. Google Maps and Threads each receive a 180-second crawl budget plus persistence grace.
6. A later status interaction uses its new reply token for progress or results.
7. This workflow contains no LINE Push API node.

main.node: Verify LINE Signature and Parse Intent
Check if Crawl Report is Ready
